name: Express Pawn Shop & Money Exchange
description_short: Express Pawn operates 9 locations across San Diego, offering collateral-based loans on jewelry, watches, electronics, and tools with competitive rates and a 0% interest first-time loan offer.
description_long:
Express Pawn has operated in San Diego for over 40 years, positioning itself as a high-end pawn shop specializing in luxury asset brokering. The company is headquartered in San Ysidro and maintains 9 locations throughout San Diego County. Unlike traditional banks, Express Pawn provides non-recourse collateral loans, meaning borrowers have no obligation to repay and the loan does not impact credit scores if unredeemed.

The company offers three primary services: buying items at market value, pawning (collateral-based loans) on jewelry, watches, diamonds, designer handbags, professional tools, electronics, bullion, and numismatic coins, and selling quality used merchandise at discounted prices. They employ GIA Graduate Gemologists to evaluate items and claim to provide instant funding and professional, discreet service. Express Pawn specifically highlights a promotional offer: 0% interest on first-time loans up to $500 for five months with no hidden fees.

Express Pawn differentiates itself by emphasizing luxury asset expertise, claiming to be the "leading high-end pawn shop in California." They market themselves as community-focused and family-oriented, with customer testimonials praising specific staff members and service quality. The company positions pawning as a sustainable practice, noting that pawn shops keep items out of landfills and are a significant source of recycled precious metals.

As a pawn shop, Express Pawn operates within a tightly regulated industry subject to federal statutes and state/local regulations. Their business model is fundamentally different from traditional credit products—loans are secured by physical collateral rather than credit-based underwriting. Interest rates and loan terms are not disclosed on their website, requiring direct contact for specific pricing. The non-recourse nature, while consumer-protective, means the company assumes all redemption risk.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers 0% interest on first loans up to $500 for five months with no hidden fees
Employs GIA Graduate Gemologists for professional jewelry and diamond evaluation
Non-recourse loans—no obligation to repay and no credit score impact if loan is not redeemed
Instant funding and fast collateral-based loans without credit checks
39+ years of operating history in San Diego with established community presence
9 convenient locations across San Diego County for accessibility
Buys and sells items, providing multiple service options beyond just lending
cons: Interest rates and specific loan terms are not disclosed on website—requires direct inquiry
Only operates in San Diego area; geographic limitation for customers outside California
Promotional 0% rate limited to first-time borrowers and $500 maximum—unclear what standard rates are for larger loans
Business model relies on physical collateral—may not accommodate customers without valuable items to pledge
Website lacks transparent information about APRs, typical loan-to-value ratios, and redemption periods
best_for: Individuals needing fast short-term cash secured by jewelry, watches, electronics, or tools
Luxury item owners seeking to liquidate high-end handbags, diamonds, or vintage watches
San Diego residents seeking an alternative to payday loans or bank loans without credit checks
Customers prioritizing non-recourse loans that won't impact their credit score if unpaid
diagnosis: Express Pawn is best suited for San Diego-area customers with valuable collateral (jewelry, watches, electronics, tools) who need fast cash without credit checks or credit impact. The main caveat is that specific interest rates and loan terms are not publicly disclosed, and the promotional 0% offer is limited to first-time borrowers with loans under $500—standard rate terms must be obtained directly from the business.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans on jewelry and precious metals
Collateral-based pawn loans on designer handbags and luxury goods
Collateral-based pawn loans on high-end watches and timepieces
Collateral-based pawn loans on diamonds and gemstones
Collateral-based pawn loans on professional-grade tools and hard goods
Collateral-based pawn loans on bullion and numismatic coins
Buying jewelry, diamonds, and precious metals at market value
Buying electronics and tools at top dollar
Selling quality used merchandise across all categories
GIA Graduate Gemologist item appraisal and authentication
First-time borrower promotional offer: 0% interest up to $500 for five months
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1050 Highland Ave # E, National City, CA 91950
